case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. JOHNSON MAO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF COUNSEL IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60935084) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $441.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 60895165) AS TO DEFENDANT MAO, JOHNSON

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MAO, JOHNSON DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-14-2017

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAO, JOHNSON $12,903.15 PRINCIPAL, $441.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,344.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60895165)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60895165) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61052464)
